How To Read This Weapon

Damage typeCorrosive
Per hit90
Shot total900per hit x hit count
Approx. DPS24800shot total + DoT / reload
Heat per sec300
Hits per shot10
TagsAoE, DoT, Multi-hit, blaster
  • Fires backwards.
  • Additional damage over time effect.

Tech Levels

LevelDescriptionProjectilePrimary MaterialSecondary Material
1Increase damage by 20%. Acid lasts 20% longer.AcidSteel x400n/a
2Increase damage by 30%. Increase the range by 30%.AcidSteel x800n/a
3Increase rate of fire by 33%. Acid lasts 30% longer. Increase duration of the damage over time effect.AcidSteel x1600n/a
4Increase damage by 38%. Increase range by 20%.AcidSteel x3200Hydrogen Crystal x800
5Increase damage by 37%. The acid lasts 30% longer.AcidSteel x6400Plasma Fluids x200
6Increase rate of fire by 45%. Acid lasts 30% longer. Increase duration of the damage over time effect.AcidSteel x12800Iridium x800
